actions.targetSignal: People already talking about favorites or dark horses.
actions.copy:
Good football question. I am asking people for exactly 3 World Cup picks before the event starts.

You can save your 3 teams free and see your private points preview here:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=x&utm_medium=manual-reply&utm_campaign=worldcup26_football_openclaw&utm_content=world-cup-2026-predictions_three-picks

Code: 26BC4B90CB
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Dexter" --platform "X" --channel "football manual replies" --status "replied" --attempt-url "<real-x-reply-url-or-private-note>" --detail "Manual X reply from david2015bestai@gmail.com at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; target=<@handle or tweet URL>; search='world cup 2026 predictions'; code 26BC4B90CB and WorldCup26 link included" --next-action "watch replies, then run campaign-referral-activity.mjs after 15 minutes"

proofRule: This agent finds and drafts. It does not auto-post. Log proof only after a real X reply URL exists, or after a precise private note says which account replied to which handle/tweet and when.
qualityRule: Reply only where the tweet is genuinely about football, World Cup, national teams, predictions, or fan picks. Personalize the first sentence before posting. Skip ads, giveaways, politics fights, and unrelated celebrity posts.
